LAW AND MOTION 301, NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF JEFF STEPHENS' MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION RELIES ON FACTS OUTSIDE THE PLEADINGS. AS TO THE AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES, PLAINTIFF MAKES NO ARGUMENT AND, IN ANY EVENT, THE MOTION IS UNTIMELY BECAUSE IT WOULD AT MOST RESULT IN AMENDMENT TOO CLOSE TO TRIAL AND WAS NOT TIMELY RAISED BY DEMURRER. Plaintiff Jeff Stephens' Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Apr-29-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Kevin Whittaker, Esq. of Gordon Rees, 415-986-5900 for defendant and opposing party, Artromick International, Inc.

RULING:
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
Plaintiff Jeff Stephens' Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION RELIES ON FACTS OUTSIDE THE PLEADINGS. AS TO THE AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES, PLAINTIFF MAKES NO ARGUMENT AND, IN ANY EVENT, THE MOTION IS UNTIMELY BECAUSE IT WOULD AT MOST RESULT IN AMENDMENT TOO CLOSE TO TRIAL AND WAS NOT TIMELY RAISED BY DEMURRER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Rhonda Aquilina, CSR # 9956 301/PJB
